contract_title: Guardian Kernel — MCP Safety Enforcement Server

template_governance.read_only_constraint: This instance MAY NOT modify THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md, CLAUDE.md, MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md, or any authoritative registry. All modifications require a human cryptographic signature in the commit chain.

contract_identity.contract_title: Guardian Kernel — MCP Safety Enforcement Server
contract_identity.strategic_intent: Build src/guardian.py as an MCP server that acts as an inescapable cage physically intercepting agent tool calls to enforce safety invariants before any code is written.

contract_topology_profile.component_role: Constitutional enforcement gate — intercepts all agent tool calls and evaluates them against Article I-V invariants before permitting execution.

constitutional_lawyer.role: Reads the law, verifies invariants, drafts the strictly-typed JSON build contract.
constitutional_lawyer.constraint: Read-only during planning phase. Cannot modify constitution or registries.

implementation_developer.role: Executes the JSON contract, writes Markdown commentary, runs preflight bash scripts.
implementation_developer.constraint: Executes only what the JSON law authorizes.

contract_topology_profile.domain_alignment: All 4 Safety Domains: Epistemic, Human, Cognitive, Empirical

prior_work_confirmed: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md ingested (Articles I-V, 6-layer enforcement stack, Agent Republic, Amendment Process)
CLAUDE.md ingested (repo structure, rules, project registry, C-RSP authority order)
MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md ingested (20 project slugs, governance chain, anomalies noted)
guardian-kernel.md ADR ingested (Series A intent, Dual Co-Pilot model, 7 directives)
BUILD_CONTRACT.md (master template) ingested (3-stage pipeline, 7 directives, Blind Man Protocol)
contract-schema.json ingested (18 required sections, allowed values, validation model)
anomalies_from_inventory: buildlattice implementation path missing on disk
empirical-guard implementation path missing on disk
epistemic-guard implementation path missing on disk
human-guard implementation path missing on disk
projects/c-rsp lacks CLAUDE.md per base-camp convention

required_files.role: Governing law — Articles I-V define all invariants Guardian must enforce
Operational controls — repo rules, project registry, C-RSP authority order
Commonwealth manifest — 20 project slugs, governance chain, anomaly log
Master C-RSP template — 3-stage pipeline, 7 directives, Blind Man Protocol
Structural law — 18 required sections, allowed values, validation rules
Architecture Decision Record — Series A strategic intent and mental model

external_dependencies.consumed_as: Read-only invariant source. Any change requires human cryptographic signature.

external_dependencies.description: Planner, Builder, Sentinel, TDD, Reviewer, DataSci agents defined in Article IV
external_dependencies.consumed_as: Tool call sources that Guardian intercepts

risk_control_classification.risk_rationale: Guardian Kernel is the only enforcement mechanism between agent intent and code execution. Failure of the Guardian allows uninspected tool calls to execute, violating Articles I-IV. Mis-configuration could also erroneously block all valid agent operations.
risk_control_classification.side_effect_rationale: Guardian modifies agent execution flow (intercept/pass/halt) within the TLC system. It does not write to production databases, external APIs, or user-facing surfaces during normal operation.
risk_control_classification.stop_override_rationale: Any STOP signal from Guardian requires human review before resuming agent operations. Agents cannot self-override a Guardian halt.

controls.name: Trinity Preflight Gate
controls.description: Guardian MUST verify Trinity ingestion before activating any enforcement hook. If Trinity unloadable, Guardian enters SAFE_HALT state.

controls.name: Read-Only Constitution Lock
controls.description: Guardian enforces file-level read-only on THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md, CLAUDE.md, and MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md. Any write attempt without a human cryptographic signature triggers HALT.

controls.name: Invariant Evaluation Engine
controls.description: Every intercepted tool call is evaluated against the 7 constitutional invariants before forwarding. FAIL triggers structured log + halt, not silent drop.

controls.name: Evidence Generation Mandatory
controls.description: Every decision (PASS or FAIL) is written to verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json with timestamp, invariant evaluated, result, and rationale.

controls.name: No Recursive Self-Modification
controls.description: Guardian cannot modify its own enforcement rules at runtime. All rule updates require a new C-RSP instance and human approval.

ordered_operations.name: Trinity Bootstrap
ordered_operations.description: Load and verify THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md, CLAUDE.md, and MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md. Compute and log content hashes. If any file missing or unreadable, enter SAFE_HALT.
ordered_operations.halt_condition: Any Trinity file missing or unreadable
ordered_operations.success_condition: All three files loaded; hashes logged to verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json

ordered_operations.name: Invariant Registry Load
ordered_operations.description: Load invariant definitions from the invariants section of this contract and from 00-constitution/invariant-registry.json if present.
ordered_operations.success_condition: Minimum 7 constitutional invariants registered in enforcement engine

ordered_operations.name: MCP Server Initialization
ordered_operations.description: Initialize MCP server, register all tool call interceptors for the 6 agents of the Agent Republic (Planner, Builder, Sentinel, TDD, Reviewer, DataSci).
ordered_operations.halt_condition: MCP server fails to bind; interceptor registration fails
ordered_operations.success_condition: MCP server running; all 6 agent interceptors registered; health check passes

ordered_operations.name: Tool Call Interception Loop
ordered_operations.description: For each incoming agent tool call: extract agent identity, tool name, parameters. Evaluate against all registered invariants sequentially.
ordered_operations.success_condition: Each call receives a deterministic PASS or FAIL judgment within 500ms

ordered_operations.name: PASS — Forward Call
ordered_operations.description: If all invariants PASS: forward the tool call to the agent unchanged. Log the PASS decision with invariant results.
ordered_operations.success_condition: Tool call forwarded unmodified; PASS record written to verification log

ordered_operations.name: FAIL — Emit STOP and Structured Log
ordered_operations.description: If any invariant FAILS: block the tool call, emit a STOP signal to the requesting agent, write a structured FAIL record to verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json with timestamp, agent, tool, invariant violated, reason, and recommended remediation.
ordered_operations.success_condition: STOP signal emitted; structured FAIL record persisted

ordered_operations.name: Evidence Flush
ordered_operations.description: On session end or SIGTERM: flush all buffered log entries to verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json. Emit a session summary record.
ordered_operations.success_condition: All log entries persisted; session summary record written

major_component_snippets.description: MCP server using FastMCP pattern, registers tool call interceptors for each agent role, enforces invariant evaluation pipeline before forwarding.

allowed_transitions.evidence_required: src/guardian.py exists and passes preflight; verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json initialized
All acceptance criteria passed; human review sign-off with cryptographic signature
Replacement C-RSP instance (CRSP-002 or later) is Active; human cryptographic signature

illegal_transitions: Active → Draft (no regression allowed without new instance)

guardian_state_machine.recovery_from_safe_halt: Manual operator intervention required; see rollback_recovery section

constitutional_invariants.name: Trinity Bootstrap Required
constitutional_invariants.rule: No code proposal, architecture decision, or executable enforcement mechanism may be activated until the three Trinity files have been successfully loaded and verified.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: Guardian enters SAFE_HALT if Trinity bootstrap fails

constitutional_invariants.name: ND Access Filter Mandatory
constitutional_invariants.source: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md Article I — SentinelOS Bill of Rights
constitutional_invariants.rule: Every agent output must pass through the Neurodivergent Access Layer filter before reaching the user. Outputs bypassing this filter are unconstitutional.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: STOP signal emitted; output blocked until ND filter applied

constitutional_invariants.name: User Rights: Safety, Accessibility, Dignity, Clarity
constitutional_invariants.rule: Every user and agent interaction carries rights to safety, accessibility, dignity, and clarity. Any interaction that violates these rights is blocked.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: STOP signal emitted; interaction flagged for human review

constitutional_invariants.name: All Tool Calls Pre-Validated
constitutional_invariants.source: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md Article II — Claude Code Governance
constitutional_invariants.rule: All tool calls from any agent must be validated by the Guardian before execution. No tool call bypasses this gate.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: Unvalidated calls are blocked; STOP emitted; structured log written

constitutional_invariants.name: Code Quality Gates: Immutability, Test Coverage, Security
constitutional_invariants.rule: Code-writing tool calls must pass immutability checks (no direct modification of constitution files), test coverage requirements (Builder cannot ship <80% coverage), and security checks.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: Failing calls blocked; Builder receives structured remediation guidance

constitutional_invariants.name: ToC&A Anchor Required
constitutional_invariants.source: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md Article III — Data Science Theory of Change
constitutional_invariants.rule: Every agent action must map to at least one Theory of Change node and have a measurable outcome. Actions with no ToC&A anchor are blocked.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: STOP emitted; DataSci agent notified to provide ToC&A mapping

constitutional_invariants.name: Agent Power Boundaries Enforced
constitutional_invariants.source: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md Article IV — Agent Powers and Limitations
constitutional_invariants.rule: Each agent operates only within its constitutional bounds. Planner cannot change architectural decisions without human review. Builder cannot deploy to production. Sentinel cannot override other agents. TDD cannot skip RED phase. Reviewer cannot approve its own work. DataSci cannot redefine ToC&A nodes without review.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: Out-of-bounds actions blocked; STOP emitted; human review required

constitutional_invariants.name: Amendment Requires Eval Harness
constitutional_invariants.rule: No agent may propose or execute a modification to the Living Constitution, CLAUDE.md, or MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md without passing through the full amendment process: Observation → Proposal → Eval Harness Review → Ratification.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: Unauthorized modification attempt blocked; STOP emitted; Amendment Process SOP-010 invoked

constitutional_invariants.name: Constitution Files Read-Only Without Cryptographic Signature
constitutional_invariants.rule: THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md, CLAUDE.md, and MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md are read-only to all agents. Any write operation requires a human cryptographic signature in the commit chain.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: Write attempt blocked; STOP emitted; human signature requested

constitutional_invariants.name: Evidence Generation Mandatory for Every Step
constitutional_invariants.rule: Every Guardian decision (PASS or FAIL) must be logged to verification/ as a structured JSON record. Silent decisions are forbidden.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: If log write fails: Guardian enters FAIL_HALT; manual recovery required

constitutional_invariants.name: Paired Artifact Execution
constitutional_invariants.rule: Every C-RSP instance must produce exactly two files sharing an identical basename: a JSON law file (authoritative, zero Markdown) and a Markdown commentary file. Any rule in the Markdown absent from the JSON is legally void.
constitutional_invariants.enforcement_action: C-RSP instance blocked from Active status until both paired artifacts exist and are syntactically valid

profile_specific_invariants.name: Guardian Cannot Self-Modify at Runtime
profile_specific_invariants.rule: src/guardian.py enforcement rules cannot be modified at runtime. All updates require a new C-RSP instance.

profile_specific_invariants.name: Log-Before-Act
profile_specific_invariants.rule: Guardian must write the decision record to verification/ before forwarding or blocking a tool call. No action without prior evidence generation.
profile_specific_invariants.enforcement_action: If log write fails before action: do not proceed; enter FAIL_HALT

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Guardian Module Exists
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: src/guardian.py exists at the TLC root and is syntactically valid Python.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: MCP Server Starts
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: python3 src/guardian.py starts an MCP server without error and registers all required tool interceptors within 5 seconds.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Trinity Bootstrap Verified
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Guardian correctly loads and logs all three Trinity files on startup. Verification log shows trinity_bootstrap: PASS.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Invariant Enforcement Active
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Guardian blocks 100% of test tool calls that violate INVARIANT_ARTICLE_IV_01 (out-of-bounds agent actions). STOP signals are emitted and logged.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Constitution Files Read-Only
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Any write attempt to THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md, CLAUDE.md, or MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md without cryptographic signature is blocked with a STOP signal and logged.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Structured Evidence Logs Produced
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: Every intercepted tool call (PASS and FAIL) produces a structured record in verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json with required fields: timestamp, agent_id, tool_name, invariants_evaluated, decision, rationale.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: Paired Artifacts Exist and Valid
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: CRSP-001.json and CRSP-001.md both exist at TLC root. CRSP-001.json is valid JSON with zero Markdown. CRSP-001.md contains the legal disclaimer. Both share basename CRSP-001.

domain_acceptance_criteria.name: No Helper File Pollution
domain_acceptance_criteria.criterion: CRSP-001.json contains no references to PASS8_TEMPLATE.md, INSTANCE_PROCESS.md, or any workflows/ subdirectory.
domain_acceptance_criteria.verification_command: grep -r 'PASS8_TEMPLATE\|INSTANCE_PROCESS\|workflows/' CRSP-001.json && echo FAIL || echo PASS

rollback_procedure.action: If Guardian enters SAFE_HALT or FAIL_HALT: all agent operations must pause immediately per SOP-013 Session Recovery Protocol.
Read the last structured log entry in verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json to identify the halt cause and failing invariant.
If cause is Trinity file missing: restore the file from git history (git checkout HEAD -- THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md).
If cause is invariant engine failure: inspect src/guardian.py for the bug, fix, and re-run preflight (./scripts/verify_crsp_template_bundle.sh).
If cause is unauthorized constitution modification: git revert the offending commit; require human cryptographic signature for re-approval.
After root cause resolved: restart Guardian (python3 src/guardian.py). Verify health check passes before resuming agent operations.
Document the incident in verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json with recovery record and lessons learned in tasks/lessons.md (Article V feed).

evidence_paths.role: Primary structured decision log — all Guardian intercepts, PASS/FAIL records, bootstrap events
The Law — authoritative JSON contract; zero Markdown
The Commentary — human-readable rationale with legal disclaimer

truth_discipline.exists_definition: File exists on disk and is non-empty
truth_discipline.verified_against_definition: Content has been read and cross-referenced against source authority
truth_discipline.not_claimed_definition: Explicitly scoped out; not asserted without evidence
truth_discipline.non_existent_definition: Checked for absence and confirmed not present
truth_discipline.unverified_definition: Known to exist or be relevant but not yet fully confirmed
truth_discipline.functional_status_definition: The actual runtime state of the Guardian enforcement system

conflicts.scenario: Guardian blocks a legitimate agent call (false positive)
conflicts.detection: Agent operator reports STOP signal on a tool call that should have passed
conflicts.resolution: Human operator reviews verification log, identifies mis-configured invariant, applies fix via new C-RSP instance (no runtime self-modification)

conflicts.scenario: Guardian fails to start (crashes on init)
conflicts.detection: python3 src/guardian.py exits non-zero; no MCP server bound
conflicts.resolution: All agent operations HALT per SOP-013. Human reads error, applies fix to src/guardian.py, re-runs preflight before restart.

conflicts.scenario: Conflicting invariant evaluations (two invariants give opposing verdicts for same tool call)
conflicts.detection: Invariant engine logs CONFLICT status in decision record
conflicts.resolution: Most restrictive invariant wins. Human review required before call can proceed.
conflicts.priority: P1 — log conflict; block call pending human review

conflicts.scenario: Constitution file legitimately needs updating (valid amendment)
conflicts.detection: Human initiates Amendment Process per Article V / SOP-010
conflicts.resolution: Full amendment pipeline: Observation → Proposal → Eval Harness → Ratification with human cryptographic signature. Guardian treats file as read-only until signature commits.

conflicts.scenario: CRSP-001.json and CRSP-001.md disagree on a rule
conflicts.detection: Human reviewer notices rule in Markdown absent from JSON
conflicts.resolution: JSON law governs. Markdown rule is legally void per Directive 5 / Paired Artifact Execution. Update Markdown to remove or mirror the rule; no enforcement change until JSON updated.
conflicts.priority: P2 — address in next C-RSP revision

halt_conditions.trigger: Trinity file missing or unreadable on startup
halt_conditions.log_action: Write SAFE_HALT record with missing file path to verification/crsp_CRSP-001_log.json
halt_conditions.recovery: Restore Trinity file from git; restart Guardian

halt_conditions.trigger: Unauthorized write to constitution file detected (no cryptographic signature)
halt_conditions.log_action: Write FAIL_HALT record with offending operation details; emit STOP to originating agent
halt_conditions.recovery: Revert write via git; human cryptographic signature required before resumption

halt_conditions.trigger: Invariant engine throws unhandled exception during evaluation
halt_conditions.log_action: Write exception traceback to verification log; block all agent operations
halt_conditions.recovery: Fix bug in src/guardian.py; re-run preflight; human review before restart

halt_conditions.trigger: Evidence log write fails (filesystem error, quota exceeded)
halt_conditions.log_action: Attempt stderr emergency record; block all operations
halt_conditions.recovery: Resolve filesystem issue; verify log integrity; restart Guardian

halt_conditions.trigger: Guardian detects self-modification attempt at runtime
halt_conditions.log_action: Write self-modification attempt record with full context; emit STOP to all agents
halt_conditions.recovery: Human security review required; potential constitutional amendment may be needed

halt_conditions.trigger: MCP server fails to bind (port conflict, dependency missing)
halt_conditions.log_action: Write bind-failure record to stderr and to verification log if writable
halt_conditions.recovery: Resolve port conflict or install missing dependency; restart Guardian

halt_conditions.log_action: Python traceback to stderr; no agent operations permitted
halt_conditions.recovery: Fix syntax error in src/guardian.py; re-run preflight

preflight_checks.command: test -f CRSP-001.json && echo PASS || echo FAIL
test -f CRSP-001.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

preflight_checks.check: CRSP-001.json is valid JSON with zero Markdown

preflight_checks.command: grep -q 'legally void' CRSP-001.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
test -d verification && echo PASS || echo FAIL

preflight_checks.check: No helper file references in CRSP-001.json
preflight_checks.command: python3 -c "import json; s=json.dumps(json.load(open('CRSP-001.json'))); assert 'PASS8_TEMPLATE' not in s and 'INSTANCE_PROCESS' not in s; print('PASS')"

preflight_checks.check: Trinity files exist at TLC root
preflight_checks.command: test -f THE_LIVING_CONSTITUTION.md && test -f CLAUDE.md && test -f MASTER_PROJECT_INVENTORY.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL

preflight_checks.check: All 18 required schema sections present in CRSP-001.json
preflight_checks.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('CRSP-001.json')); s=d.get('sections',{}); required=['template_governance','contract_identity','contract_topology_profile','baseline_state','dependencies_inputs','risk_control_classification','execution_model','lifecycle_state_machine','invariants','acceptance_criteria','rollback_recovery','evidence_truth_surface','conflict_matrix','halt_matrix','preflight','adoption_tiers','output_format','instance_declaration']; missing=[r for r in required if r not in s]; print('PASS' if not missing else f'FAIL missing={missing}')"

preflight.preflight_pass_condition: All PF-001 through PF-008 return PASS
preflight.preflight_fail_action: Report exact failing checks in Standard Outcome Response; do not advance Guardian to Active status

output_artifacts.type: The Law — authoritative JSON, zero Markdown
The Commentary — human-readable with legal disclaimer

instance_declaration.declaration: This file is an EXECUTED INSTANCE of the C-RSP master template. It is not a reusable template. It governs exactly one build scope: the Guardian Kernel MCP server (src/guardian.py) for The Living Constitution Series A.

execution_context.produced_by: Cursor AI coding assistant — CRSP-001 Stage 2 execution

instance_declaration.legal_note: Any rule, constraint, or requirement appearing in CRSP-001.md but absent from this file (CRSP-001.json) is legally void and shall not be enforced by the Guardian kernel.
